title: Visual parity with embedded prototypes
acceptance: Side-by-side comparison at 1280px (desktop) and 390px (mobile home) shows same structure, tokens, copy, chart geometry for both personas

title: Patient/persona toggle (full roster)
acceptance: Switch any of the 13 patients from a grouped control; updates all sections + header identity via API refetch, no reload; persists per session

title: Responsive view switching at 880px
acceptance: Live swap on resize, persona preserved, no reload; <880 mobile experience, >=880 desktop dashboard

title: Overview: greeting, persona banner, five stat tiles with deltas
acceptance: Values match spec-seed-data; Robert banner gold w/ schedule CTA; Maria banner red-container

title: Trends & Labs charts
acceptance: Robert: A1c quarterly line w/ <7.5 shaded zone + red latest; glucose 14-day w/ 80-130 band. Maria: risk scale marker at 6.1; weight 6-month line w/ gold dashed goal 178; lab history list w/ status icons

title: Care & Medications (robert)
acceptance: Med list taken/due, refill-ready from claims, 4-week adherence grid 26/28 (1 partial, 1 missed, today pending), care team cards

title: Care & Prevention (maria)
acceptance: MDPP 9/16 sessions bar, 3.6%-of-5% milestone bar, next session Tue Jun 9 6:00 PM, care team cards, 6.5% escalation rule copy

title: Activity & Nutrition
acceptance: Weekly bars per seed (today bar gold), goal lines (7000 steps / 150 min), nutrition progress bars per seed

title: Coaching feed & matched programs
acceptance: Human + auto messages w/ timestamps and action buttons; program chips Active/Eligible/Suggested/Available/Near you

title: Data & Consent center + granular audit trail
acceptance: Sources w/ last-sync + standards chips; consent granted 2026-03-03 w/ IAL2/AAL2 identity (FR-14); sharing rows; revoke action; VIEWABLE audit trail (replaces bare count) w/ actor, timestamp, scope, purpose-of-use (treatment|individual_access|patient_share|operations)

title: Animated charts on scroll-into-view
acceptance: Per animation spec; once per session; prefers-reduced-motion renders final state with no animation

title: All data from SQLite via internal API
acceptance: No hardcoded display data in components; API responses observable in network tab

title: Simulated Aligned Network sync + Record Locator
acceptance: Sync now runs a simulated Record Locator (returns discovered orgs + record counts) then 400-1200ms latency, last_sync_at=demo-now, success toast; locator results visible in Data & Consent

title: IAL2/AAL2 identity + consent gate
acceptance: One-tap passkey or mDL sign-in at IAL2/AAL2 then scoped OAuth 2.0 authorization before dashboard; revoke -> disconnected empty states w/ reconnect; consent record stores credential type, IAL, AAL; theatrical, no real IdP

title: Replay care-team alert (robert)
acceptance: Demo control re-fires alert: aria-live toast, banner highlight, feed entry

title: Demo reset
acceptance: POST /api/demo/reset restores exact seed state

title: /how-it-works briefing page
acceptance: Takeaway strip, data-flow columns, 5 framework cards, security note from prototype 1; responsive

title: Accessibility per section 12
acceptance: Lighthouse a11y >=95 both views; keyboard-only demo walkthrough passes; axe clean on critical

title: Count-up stat tiles
acceptance: 700ms count-up on first view; reduced-motion safe

title: Presenter notes overlay on '?'
acceptance: Overlay lists demo script; dismissible; hidden from tab order until opened

title: Expanded 13-patient roster
acceptance: All 13 personas (featured:1 sarah, diabetes:7, obesity:5) selectable from grouped control; every screen renders from SQLite for each; varied states visible (well-controlled vs high-risk, device-rich vs none, high vs low engagement)

title: Gamification & rewards
acceptance: /rewards shows points, level ring, current/best streak, earned+locked badges, challenges; award control fires toast + badge pop-in (500ms, scale+gold glow) with aria-live; reduced-motion renders final state

title: Smart-device connections
acceptance: Device catalog with connected/available states; simulated pairing modal (1-2s) flips connected, sets last_sync_at, adds source + data series; CGM reveals time-in-range card, BP cuff reveals BP trend; disconnect hides device-only cards

title: Connect with provider
acceptance: Threads per care-team member; send guidance request -> seeded simulated reply after delay; share-snapshot posts snapshot card + logs access; appointment booking confirms seeded slot; persistent 'simulated responses' label

title: AI assistant chat & record interpretation (deterministic, no LLM)
acceptance: Intent engine over patient SQLite data (structured + unstructured docs) returns {answer, sourceCitation, disclaimer, suggestedChips}; labels AI vs clinical judgment; gives plain-language incl. med titration; documented intents work for every persona; unmatched -> safe fallback; behind interpret() swap seam; no inference request leaves app

title: AI assistant voice (Web Speech API)
acceptance: Mic uses browser SpeechRecognition/speechSynthesis; listening indicator + stop control; hidden with clear message where unsupported; no audio leaves browser

title: Questions-for-your-provider builder
acceptance: Generates 3-5 tailored questions from patient data; save + 'send to provider' posts into a thread (FR-24); may award Coach Conversation badge

title: Local services finder
acceptance: Five categories filter over seeded dataset; schematic SVG map pins align with list; open-now from demo clock; persona-aware ordering/tags; no external map/tile/geo request

title: Healthy recipes
acceptance: Auto-filter by active patient condition+allergies+diet (emily: vegetarian, peanut+shellfish-free only); active-filter banner explains + removable chips; detail view w/ ingredients, steps, nutrition, allergen callout

title: Point-of-care sharing — Kill the Clipboard / Ax the Fax
acceptance: From /share: shareable QR (mock token), 'simulate check-in' records share_sessions + access_log(treatment); visit summary returns via mock Smart Health Link as a clinical_documents(visit_summary) and fires AI read; demonstrable end-to-end for sarah

title: Full-chart clinical records + unstructured documents
acceptance: /records lists structured (coded) items + >=3 unstructured doc types (radiology, outside_lab, specialist_note) + returned visit_summaries as DocumentReference mocks; viewer exposes real DOM text; each has 'Explain this' AI read

title: AI interpretive insight cards + titration explainer
acceptance: Proactive seeded insights (trend/titration/referral_suggestion) on overview/trends; each badged 'AI-generated, not clinical judgment', names its basis, has escalation action; sarah shows a referral_suggestion; titration explainer after a returned visit summary

title: Semantic interoperability (LOINC/RxNorm/SNOMED, USCDI v3)
acceptance: labs.loinc, medications.rxnorm, conditions.snomed present and shown in record/detail views; standards stated as USCDI v3 / US Core IG; codes illustrative, flagged for validation (11.1)

title: Conversational symptom & care-plan check-in
acceptance: Assistant logs a symptom/check-in (symptom_checkins); red-flag keywords return direct-to-care safety response, never a diagnosis

title: Featured comorbid persona Sarah + guided journey
acceptance: sarah (T2D + obesity, Medicare) selectable + pinned Featured; skippable journey steps (identity -> QR share -> returned visit summary -> AI interpretation -> coaching -> audit) launchable from Overview and presenter overlay
